title: Fundamental hydrogen storage properties of TiFe-alloy with partial substitution of Fe by Ti and Mn - Raw Dataset related to publication
author: Erika Michela Dematteis
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Data type: Experimental measurements and Rietveld Refinement. Date format: .xls, .xlsm,.opj, .pcr, .dat (Software FullProf package outputs). Origin of the data: Experimental EMPA, x-ray diffraction patterns, and kinetic measurements of hydrogen absorption. Data generated by electron probe micro-analysis (Cameca SX100), a Bruker D8 Advance Bragg Brentano diffractometer using Cu-Kα radiation (λ=1.5418 Å), and a home-made Sieverts’ type apparatus from CNRS, ICMPE, Thiais, France. Software needed to plot the data: Origin and Excel. Software needed to analyse the data: FullProf package.
steps_raw: Data type: Experimental measurements and Rietveld Refinement. Date format: .xls, .xlsm,.opj, .pcr, .dat (Software FullProf package outputs).
